name: AIDLC System Tests
description: System validation specs for AIDLC runner capabilities. Safe to run repeatedly.
projectContext:
This is a dedicated test project for validating AIDLC runner capabilities.

Purpose:
- TEST-01: Validates file writing, validation gating, resume-from-failure, and cleanup
- TEST-02+: Additional capability tests (reporting, linting, etc.)

All test artifacts go in test/scratch/ and are deleted by the final SP.
This project never touches production code. Safe to run repeatedly.
constraints: All test artifacts must go in test/scratch/ only
The final SP must always clean up test/scratch/
TypeScript strict mode for any .ts files written
Never import unused variables or modules
